word: H6751 - צָלַל - tsâlal - tsaw-lal' - Begin to be dark

sections.paragraph:
Original: צלל

Transliteration: tsâlal

Phonetic: tsaw-lal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be or become or grow dark
    1. (Qal) to become or grow dark
    2. (Hiphil) to shadow

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6749 through the idea of hovering over (compare H6754)]

TWOT entry: 1921

Part(s) of speech: Verb
